/usr/lib/ccache/c++ CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/stb_image.cpp.o -o app  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -lassimp -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
